adopter.description: Adopter job that takes ownership of pre-existing CoreDNS resources.

image.description: Image used by the adopter job.

cluster.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.cluster.* for Corefile config and service.clusterIP for the DNS service IP.

configmap.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.* instead. coredns.public.cache.success.ttl / coredns.cluster.cache.success.ttl replace configmap.cache; coredns.<zone>.log replaces configmap.log; coredns.public.forward.to replaces configmap.forward; coredns.public.forward.* replaces configmap.forwardOptions; coredns.public.autopath replaces configmap.autopath; coredns.custom replaces configmap.custom.

cache.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.<zone>.cache.success.ttl. Cache TTL seed (seconds).

custom.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.custom. Raw Corefile snippet.

forward.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.public.forward.to. Forward directive (see https://coredns.io/plugins/forward/), e.g. ". 192.168.1.1 /etc/resolv.conf".

forwardOptions.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.public.forward. Newline-separated forward plugin options.

log.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.<zone>.log. Newline-separated log classes.

enabled.description: Whether to deploy the control-plane CoreDNS instance. Defaults to mastersInstance.enabled for backward compatibility.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the control-plane CoreDNS instance.

coredns.description: CoreDNS Corefile configuration. Cache, log and loadbalance are configured per zone, so different zones can behave differently. A zone that omits cache falls back to the built-in defaults (success 9984 30 / denial 9984 5); a zone that omits log/loadbalance falls back to denial+error / round_robin.

additionalZones.description: Additional fully-templated local zones. Each entry is its own CoreDNS server block and renders whichever of forward/kubernetes it declares (or both, or neither). Per-entry keys: names (required), cidrs, cache, forward, kubernetes, log, loadbalance — same shapes as coredns.public/coredns.cluster.

cluster.description: The cluster.local zone — in-cluster DNS served by the kubernetes plugin.

cache.description: Cache plugin configuration for this zone (https://coredns.io/plugins/cache/).

capacity.description: Maximum number of cached negative responses.

denialZones.description: Limit the denial disable to these zones.

successZones.description: Limit the success disable to these zones.

keepttl.description: Preserve original TTLs instead of counting them down.

prefetch.description: Prefetch popular entries before they expire.

amount.description: Prefetch when at least this many requests are received (enables prefetch).

duration.description: Only prefetch if the item was requested within this duration.

percentage.description: Only prefetch if this percentage of the TTL remains (requires duration).

serveStale.description: Serve stale answers while refreshing in the background.

duration.description: How long stale answers may be served.

verifyTimeout.description: With refreshMode verify — max wait for upstream verify before serving stale.

duration.description: How long to cache SERVFAIL responses.

capacity.description: Maximum number of cached positive responses.

ttl.description: Max TTL for positive responses (seconds). Defaults to configmap.cache for backward compatibility.
Top-level TTL cap applied before the success/denial checks (seconds).

zones.description: Cache ZONES — limit caching to these zones. Empty means the server-block zones.

domains.description: Zone names served by this block. Defaults to cluster.kubernetes.clusterDomain when unset.

kubernetes.description: Kubernetes plugin configuration (https://coredns.io/plugins/kubernetes/). Leave a key unset to keep the CoreDNS default.

apiserverBurst.description: apiserver_burst — max burst size for API server requests.

apiserverMaxInflight.description: apiserver_max_inflight — max concurrent in-flight API server requests.

apiserverQPS.description: apiserver_qps — max queries-per-second to the API server.

endpoint.description: endpoint URL — remote k8s API endpoint (omit for in-cluster).

endpointPodNames.description: endpoint_pod_names — use the pod name instead of the dashed IP.

fallthrough.description: fallthrough — pass unresolved queries to the next plugin (all zones).

fallthroughZones.description: fallthrough ZONES... — limit fallthrough to these zones.

ignoreEmptyService.description: ignore empty_service — NXDOMAIN for services without ready endpoints.

kubeconfig.description: kubeconfig KUBECONFIG [CONTEXT] — authenticate via a kubeconfig file.

labels.description: labels EXPRESSION — expose only objects matching the selector.

namespaceLabels.description: namespace_labels EXPRESSION — expose only namespaces matching the selector.

namespaces.description: namespaces NAMESPACE... — expose only these namespaces.

startupTimeout.description: startup_timeout — wait for informer cache sync at startup.

tls.description: tls CERT KEY CACERT — for a remote k8s connection.

loadbalance.description: Load balancing policy. Omit to fall back to round_robin.

log.description: CoreDNS log classes for this zone. Omit to fall back to denial+error.

podCIDR.description: Pod CIDR for the reverse zone. Defaults to cluster.calico.CIDR when unset.

serviceCIDR.description: Service CIDR for the reverse zone. Defaults to cluster.kubernetes.API.clusterIPRange when unset.

custom.description: Raw Corefile snippet appended verbatim at the end of the configuration.

public.description: The "." zone — external/public DNS served by the forward plugin.

autopath.description: autopath plugin args, e.g. "@kubernetes". Empty disables autopath.

cache.description: Cache plugin configuration for this zone (https://coredns.io/plugins/cache/).

capacity.description: Maximum number of cached negative responses.

denialZones.description: Limit the denial disable to these zones.

successZones.description: Limit the success disable to these zones.

keepttl.description: Preserve original TTLs instead of counting them down.

prefetch.description: Prefetch popular entries before they expire.

amount.description: Prefetch when at least this many requests are received (enables prefetch).

duration.description: Only prefetch if the item was requested within this duration.

percentage.description: Only prefetch if this percentage of the TTL remains (requires duration).

serveStale.description: Serve stale answers while refreshing in the background.

duration.description: How long stale answers may be served.

verifyTimeout.description: With refreshMode verify — max wait for upstream verify before serving stale.

duration.description: How long to cache SERVFAIL responses.

capacity.description: Maximum number of cached positive responses.

ttl.description: Max TTL for positive responses (seconds). Defaults to configmap.cache for backward compatibility.
Top-level TTL cap applied before the success/denial checks (seconds).

zones.description: Cache ZONES — limit caching to these zones. Empty means the server-block zones.

forward.description: Forward plugin configuration (https://coredns.io/plugins/forward/). The FROM is always ".". Only a representative subset of parameters is wired up today; leave a key unset to keep the CoreDNS default.

dohMethod.description: doh_method — HTTP method for DoH requests.

except.description: except NAMES — domains to pass through unforwarded.

expire.description: expire — close idle upstream connections after this duration.

failfastAllUnhealthyUpstreams.description: failfast_all_unhealthy_upstreams — SERVFAIL when all upstreams are down.

failover.description: failover RCODE... — retry the next upstream on these rcodes (e.g. [SERVFAIL, REFUSED]).

forceTCP.description: force_tcp — always use TCP to the upstream.

maxConcurrent.description: max_concurrent — maximum number of concurrent queries to forward.

maxConnectAttempts.description: max_connect_attempts — cap on connect attempts per request (0 = no cap).

maxFails.description: max_fails — consecutive failed health checks before marking an upstream down.

maxIdleConns.description: max_idle_conns — idle connections cached per upstream (0 = unlimited).

next.description: next RCODE... — run the next forward plugin on these rcodes (e.g. [NXDOMAIN]).

nextOnNodata.description: next_on_nodata — run the next forward plugin on empty NOERROR answers.

preferUDP.description: prefer_udp — try UDP first even for queries received over TCP.

resolver.description: resolver IP[:PORT]... — resolvers for hostname-based "to" endpoints.

tls.description: tls CERT KEY CA — set cert+key, ca, all three, or enabled for bare tls.

enabled.description: Emit bare "tls" (system CAs, no client auth).

tlsServername.description: tls_servername NAME — expected server cert name (e.g. dns.quad9.net).

to.description: Upstream DNS servers (the forward TO targets). Empty means use /etc/resolv.conf.

loadbalance.description: Load balancing policy. Omit to fall back to round_robin.

log.description: CoreDNS log classes for this zone. Omit to fall back to denial+error.

groupID.description: DEPRECATED: use securityContext.runAsGroup. GID the CoreDNS process runs as.

behavior.description: Scaling behavior. The stabilization window restricts replica-count flapping when the scaling metrics keep fluctuating.

stabilizationWindowSeconds.description: Seconds to consider while scaling down to prevent flapping.

metrics.description: Additional custom metrics for the HPA (autoscaling/v2 metric objects).

targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.description: Target average memory utilization percentage. Set to 0 to disable the memory metric.

loadbalancePolicy.description: DEPRECATED: use coredns.<zone>.loadbalance (per-zone). Load balancing policy.

mastersInstance.description: DEPRECATED: use controlPlane. mastersInstance.enabled stays backward compatible — controlPlane.enabled takes precedence only when explicitly set.

enabled.description: Whether to deploy the control-plane CoreDNS instance.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the control-plane CoreDNS instance.

name.description: Name used for the CoreDNS workload and its resources.

namespace.description: Namespace the CoreDNS resources are deployed into.

podDisruptionBudget.description: Pod disruption budget for the CoreDNS workloads.

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of pods that can be unavailable to voluntary disruptions.

port.description: Port for the Prometheus metrics endpoint. Defaults to 9153 when unset.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the CoreDNS containers.

securityContext.description: Pod-level security context for the CoreDNS containers.

runAsGroup.description: GID the CoreDNS process runs as. Defaults to groupID when unset.

runAsUser.description: UID the CoreDNS process runs as. Defaults to userID when unset.

clusterIP.description: Cluster IP of the DNS Service. Defaults to cluster.kubernetes.DNS.IP when unset.

serviceType.description: Giant Swarm service type label applied to the resources.

updateStrategy.description: Update strategy for the CoreDNS workloads.

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of pods that can be unavailable during the update.

userID.description: DEPRECATED: use securityContext.runAsUser. UID the CoreDNS process runs as.
